outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH - Negative GEX (-25B) amplifies movements. Dealers short gamma will accelerate any directional move.
outlook.summary: Spot pinned near 6400 RESONANCE resistance with extreme negative gamma exposure. Weekly/Monthly show heavy PUT positioning (PCR 2.72-3.38) and bearish skew. 0DTE reverse_smirk suggests short-term bounce potential toward Max Pain 6495. Key inflection: break below 6350 accelerates selloff, break above 6400 targets 6495-6500 zone.

levels.motivazione: Triple expiry PUT OI convergence (0DTE 4693, WEEKLY 3650, MONTHLY 23645). Dealers hedging creates strong selling pressure at this level.
Massive volume spike (97K vs 4K OI = 23.8x ratio) indicates urgent hedging. Negative GEX amplifies importance.
Top PUT OI in WEEKLY (5637). Immediate support just below spot with multi-expiry presence.
0DTE Max Pain 1.75% above spot. Negative GEX environment increases magnetic pull as dealers target pinning.
MONTHLY top PUT OI (24121) + multi-expiry convergence. Structural ceiling with mixed PUT/CALL dynamics.
Large CALL OI (7180) just above Max Pain creates secondary resistance. Confluence with magnetic zone.
PUT OI in 0DTE (6464) and MONTHLY (18524). Secondary support zone if 6350 fails.
Largest 0DTE CALL OI (7405). Distant ceiling limiting upside in negative GEX environment.
